data.title: Savannah Guthrie rejoins 'Today' after mother's disappearance, 84-year-old Nancy remains missing.
data.description: The anchor made a return to the show's cast on Monday after her 84-year-old mother, Nancy, went missing and hasn't been found yet.

data.title: Zephyr Releases its PSN Outlook for 2026 Showcasing Opportunities for Investing in Separately Managed Accounts (SMAs) for 2026 and Beyond
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Zephyr, a branch of Informa plc (LSE: INF) known for asset and wealth management software, unveiled the long-awaited PSN Outlook for 2026. A comprehensive eBook was created for asset management companies to contribute their insights and perspectives.

data.title: The TurfMutt Foundation Says Small Actions Yield Big Results this Earth Day 2026
data.description: Louisville, Kentucky - On April 6, 2026, the TurfMutt Foundation urged Americans to recognize the ecological impact of their backyards and local parks in honor of Earth Day 2026. Encouraging small steps like maintaining a balanced landscape, the foundation emphasized the importance of individual efforts in fostering environmental stewardship.

data.title: Mohegan Sun Arena Marks 25th Anniversary with Two Metallica Performances
data.description: This November, Uncasville, CT will host special anniversary concerts in honor of Mohegan Sun Arena's 25th anniversary. Metallica, renowned Rock & Roll Hall of Famers and Nine-time GRAMMY® Award winners, will be headlining the event with two unique performances. The concerts are set to take place as part of the arena's milestone celebration, marking a significant occasion for music enthusiasts.

SUPPLY CHAIN STRESS HITS 2023 HIGHS NY Fed data shows supply chain pressures rose in March to the highest level since early 2023. The index climbed to 0.68 (from 0.54)—above normal but still far below the 2021 peak of 4.49 during the pandemic.

data.title: BitMine now holds nearly 4% of Ethereum's supply as ETH reaches its weekly peak, adding $150 million last week to its $10.3 billion stash.
data.description: Last week, BitMine Immersion Technologies, a publicly traded Ethereum treasury company, increased its holdings by $150 million, enhancing its total Ethereum stash to $10.3 billion.
